title: 5 Water-Based Block Printing Inks | Black, Blue, Red, White & Yellow | 38ml High Concentration Tubes | Easy-to-Mix | High Opacity - by Zieler
features: 5 tubes (38ml) – Black, Blue, Red, White & Yellow.
Water-based (non-permanent) – no nasty odours, simple application. Easy to wash off hands and equipment.
Applying only a small amount of ink gives good coverage with high-opacity.
Formulated so that colours will easily mix with one another so create a wide array of other others for a bold, crisp finish.
description: This set contains 38ml tubes of ink in the primary colours of red, blue and yellow plus black and white. They are specially designed to mix easily with one another to create any colour your heart desires. Perfect for artists, printmakers and beginners alike, just a small amount of the ink offers excellent coverage and tack. Its water-based formulation maintains a creamy, easy-to-roll consistency for enhanced transfer and effortless printing. The non-permanent nature of the inks encourages testing and experimenting to develop new ideas and creations. The inks produce no nasty odours and are easy to clean off hands and equipment (with soap and water) making them a pleasure to work with. Dries quickly to a crisp, vibrant finish - ideal for use on paper and card.
